nasb.text: Then Jacob sent messengers before him to his brother Esau in the land of Seir, the country of Edom.

esv.text: And Jacob sent messengers before him to Esau his brother in the land of Seir, the country of Edom,

cnv.text: 雅各先派使者到西珥地，就是以東的地區，他的哥哥以掃那裡去，

ccb.text: 雅各先派人到西珥，就是以东，去见他哥哥以扫，

csbs.text: 雅各派使者们在他之前，到以东地界的西珥地，去他哥哥以扫那里。
